title: polypodium moritzianum
intro: Polypodium moritzianum is a species of fern native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Polypodiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Polypodium moritzianum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using it as a poultice to apply directly to the skin.
